task_description: Phase 2.5 Gameplay Enhancement Layer for Plague of Danjin. Implements 10 interconnected systems: Items & Equipment, Elemental System, Skills & Cooldowns, Status Effects, Enemy Telegraph, New Enemy Types, Event Rooms, Run Modifiers, Extended Events, and CombatEngine Integration.

verification.summary: All class files compile cleanly with javac. No System.in/out/err in model or controller. Semantic review v1 found 9 issues (incomplete skill implementations, unused reflect, unused poison immunity). All 9 fixed in commit 1e337c3. Semantic review v2 verdict: APPROVED with 4 non-blocking observations.
